vocabulary.example: Fortunately, the seminar will finish at 4 P.M.

vocabulary.example: You will interview Jin Wang for the marketing manager position.

vocabulary.example: I am going to go to New York for the promotional events.
vocabulary.translation: 저는 홍보 이벤트를 위해 뉴욕에 갈 예정입니다.
